ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment fund */,
  "fund_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of investment fund (e.g., Equity, Bond, Balanced) */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was established */,
  "management_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment management company overseeing the fund */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* The fund's expense ratio */,
  "min_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for the fund */,
  "investment_style" TEXT /* Description of the investment style (e.g., value, growth, blend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_funds_management_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("management_company_id") REFERENCES management_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_funds_fund_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_type_id") REFERENCES fund_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund being evaluated */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The period (year) of the performance record */,
  "fund_return" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund during the period */,
  "category_return_low" REAL /* Lowest return percentage in the category during the period */,
  "category_return_high" REAL /* Highest return percentage in the category during the period */,
  "rank_percentage" REAL /* Rank of the fund in its category as a percentage */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the fund during the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the fund during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_records_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Equity, Fixed Income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., asset class, sector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "management_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the management company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was established */,
  "assets_under_management" REAL /* Total assets under management by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund type (e.g., Equity, Bond) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the fund type belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment goal */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund this goal is associated with */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* The investment objective of the fund (e.g., growth, income) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the investment (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return for the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_goals_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund being analyzed */,
  "period" INTEGER /* The year of the performance record */,
  "fund_return" REAL /* Return percentage of the fund during the period */,
  "category_return" REAL /* Average return percentage of the category during the period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the fund during the period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the fund during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES investment_funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource or feature accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund-risk_model_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund being mapped */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk model being applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)
